### Communication

The communication in SFMTL is a matter of sending (saving to the disk)
two things, the classification head and a randomly picked data
represntation.

href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/clients/sfmtl.py#L103"

``` python

def save_state(
    save_to_disk:bool=False
):

```

*Save client’s state including model, optimizer, anchor, and label set
to a dictionary. Optionally, save the state to disk.*
